creator: freebsd@omarpolo.com
text:
Created attachment 244876
opensmtpd-filter-rspamd 0.1.8

Hello,

this is a relatively important security update since anyone trying to do a login against an user with a '|' in it will crash opensmtpd-filter-rspamd, tearing down smtpd along the way too.  (opensmtpd dies when one of the filter quits.)

https://github.com/poolpOrg/filter-rspamd/releases/tag/v0.1.8
